## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Security And Data Boundaries

- [ ] No secrets, real credentials, or customer data are included.
- [ ] Reservation authority remains in deterministic CRM application/database logic.
- [ ] n8n or external automation does not write directly to reservation tables.
- [ ] Upstream MIT attribution remains preserved when touched.
